title: Nargisi Kofta (Egg-Stuffed Meatballs)
time: Prep Time: 45 min | Cook Time: 45 min

For the Kofta (Meatballs): 1 tbsp besan (gram flour) – optional, for binding

Method.title: 1. Prepare the Eggs
steps: Boil eggs for 8–10 minutes until hard-boiled.
Peel and keep aside. Slice a thin layer off the bottom to make them sit flat.

Method.title: 2. Make the Kofta Mixture
steps: In a mixing bowl, combine minced meat, grated onion, ginger-garlic paste, green chilies, red chili powder, turmeric, garam masala, chopped coriander, and salt.
Mix well and knead for 3–4 minutes. Add besan if the mixture feels too soft.

Method.title: 3. Shape the Nargisi Kofta
steps: Divide the meat mixture into 4–5 equal portions.
Flatten a portion in your palm, place a boiled egg in the center, and carefully wrap the meat around it, sealing completely.
Ensure no gaps so the egg stays intact while cooking.

Method.title: 4. Fry the Kofta
steps: Heat oil in a deep pan.
Shallow fry the koftas until golden brown on all sides. Remove and drain on paper towels.

Method.title: 5. Prepare the Gravy
steps: Heat oil/ghee in a pan, add cumin seeds, and let them sizzle.
Add sliced onions and sauté until golden brown.
Add ginger-garlic paste, sauté until raw smell disappears.
Stir in tomato puree, coriander powder, turmeric, and red chili powder. Cook until oil separates.
Add water or stock, bring to a simmer.
Slowly add cream or whisked yogurt, stirring continuously to avoid curdling.
Add garam masala, adjust salt.

Method.title: 6. Cook Koftas in Gravy
steps: Gently place the fried koftas into the simmering gravy.
Cover and cook on low heat for 8–10 minutes, letting flavors infuse.

Method.title: 7. Garnish and Serve
steps: Sprinkle fresh coriander leaves.
Serve hot with naan, roti, or steamed basmati rice.

Chef Tips: Use fresh, lean meat for soft koftas.
Ensure koftas are tightly wrapped around eggs to prevent breaking.
Simmer gravy gently; high heat can cause cream/yogurt to split.
Optional: Add a pinch of saffron soaked in warm milk to gravy for a luxurious touch.
